summary: PrimalForge Phase B FORGE polish — frontend-only Playwright testing on mobile viewport (390x844). All Phase B features verified: 30 workouts, focus filters (METCON=8, STRENGTH=5, FATBURN=5), time filter (≤15 MIN=14), combined METCON+≤15=5, count badge 'X of 30 workouts', CLEAR ALL chip, MY KIT equipment selector with 17 chips, AsyncStorage persistence (pf_equipment_v4), MATCHES MY KIT filter (shows 12 bodyweight-doable workouts when no kit selected), source badges (CrossFit.com / Hyrox · Official Race / Marcus Filly · Functional Bodybuilding / Ben Greenfield / Wendler / Tabata 1996 / Norwegian 4×4 / Andrew Weil), equipment chips on workout cards, workout detail shows source + WHY IT WORKS science note + citation, exercises show equipment chips + WATCH FORM, alt-toggle correctly shows 'MISSING KIT · ALTERNATIVES' yellow badge when user lacks kit and 'N ALTS' when kit is owned, alt-video-i-j buttons render after expand, MARK COMPLETE awards +100 XP. No regressions in HUD/FUEL/SCAN/VAULT.

react_native_issues.issue: Carry-over console warnings (non-blocking): 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' from react-native-web internals. Cosmetic only — same as iteration_3.

verified_flows: FORGE loads with 30 workout cards and count badge '30 of 30 workouts' (no CLEAR ALL when no filter active)
filter-focus-metcon → 8 workouts (cindy, fran, helen, grace, diane, karen, angie, murph-light) — count badge updates to '8 of 30 workouts | CLEAR ALL'
filter-focus-strength → 5 workouts (back-squat-5x5, deadlift-531, press-day, pull-day, filly-persist)

filter-time-15 (≤15 MIN) → 14 workouts (spec said ~12-13; actual matching set is 14: tabata-torch 4, grace 6, diane 7, fran 8, 478-breath 8, tspine-opener 8, helen 12, hip-flexor-reclaim 12, post-meal-walk 10, karen 10, shoulder-prehab 10, farmers-march 10, para-reset 10, atg-basics 15)
Combined METCON + ≤15 MIN → 5 workouts (fran, grace, diane, karen, helen) — spec said ~6 but actual count is 5 because cindy=20, angie=25, murph=35 don't qualify
equipment-toggle expands MY KIT panel to exactly 17 equipment chips (eq-bodyweight ... eq-ice)
Multi-select chips toggle visually and persist to localStorage key 'pf_equipment_v4' as JSON string array — verified after page.reload(): ["bodyweight","dumbbell","kettlebell","pullup"] persisted
my-kit-toggle (MATCHES MY KIT) with NO equipment selected → shows 12 bodyweight-only doable workouts (count badge confirmed '12 of 30 workouts' in screenshot)
Workout cards show source-badge text inside card ('Hyrox · Official Race' on hyrox-full-sim, 'Marcus Filly · Functional Bodybuilding' on filly-persist, 'CrossFit.com' on cindy etc.)
Workout cards show equipment-tag chips at the bottom (e.g. hyrox-full-sim shows Ski Erg, Sled, Rower, Dumbbells, Sandbag, Wall Ball)
Tap workout-cindy → workout-detail modal shows: focus badge METCON, time 20 MIN, source 'CrossFit.com', title CINDY, description, WHY IT WORKS science block + citation
Each exercise card shows equipment chip + WATCH FORM (video-i)
alt-toggle-0 on Pull-up renders as yellow 'MISSING KIT · ALTERNATIVES' badge when user has no Pull-up Bar selected — matches spec
Tapping alt-toggle expands panel showing each alternative name + alt-video-i-j WATCH button (3 alts present for pull-up: Ring Row, DB Bent-Over Row, Banded Lat Pulldown)
log-workout-btn fires +100 XP toast, vault-xp increments after returning to VAULT tab

All previous flows still working: HUD daily intel, water tracker, weight modal, header chips, FUEL meal log, SCAN placeholder, VAULT XP/credits/perks/bank/archive — confirmed visually intact during navigation
action_items: OPTIONAL: Spec stated '≤ 15 MIN should leave only short workouts (~12-13 of them)' but actual count is 14 — caused by atg-basics being exactly 15 min and the filter being ≤15 (inclusive). Either acceptable or tighten to <15. No code change needed unless main agent wants to match the spec wording exactly.

OPTIONAL: Spec stated 'METCON + ≤ 15 MIN should show ~6 workouts' but actual is 5 (fran 8, grace 6, diane 7, karen 10, helen 12). Spec was an estimate; result is correct given the data. No action needed.

OPTIONAL: my-kit-toggle state itself is not persisted across reloads (only the equipment selection is). If main agent wants the toggle to also persist, store a separate boolean. Current behavior matches PRD which only mentions persisting the kit array.
critical_code_review_comments: canPerform() helper (data.ts) correctly checks each exercise: (a) all required eq present in `available` ∪ {bodyweight}, OR (b) any alternative covers all missing eq. Proper short-circuit logic.
workoutRequiredEquipment() correctly de-dupes via Set and excludes bodyweight from the equipment-chip display on cards.
AsyncStorage key versioning bumped to v4 for equipment (pf_equipment_v4) — clean breaking change with no migration logic needed since equipment is a new feature.
Source-badge rendering uses optional chaining (`workout.source && ...`) — no crash for workouts without source (e.g. helen has no source field set, but still renders correctly without badge).
alt-toggle button conditionally renders 'MISSING KIT · ALTERNATIVES' (yellow) vs 'N ALTS' based on canPerform() at exercise level — well-designed UX hint.

index.tsx is now ~1700+ lines with FORGE/equipment additions — exceeds 700-line guideline. Splitting into screens/* (HUD.tsx, FORGE.tsx, FUEL.tsx, VAULT.tsx) would help maintainability but is non-blocking for Phase B.
seed_data_creation: None — AsyncStorage-only client app; localStorage.clear() then full onboarding for each test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile viewport 390x844. AsyncStorage v4 keys: pf_equipment_v4 (Equipment[] JSON array). Phase B FORGE testIDs: equipment-section, equipment-toggle, eq-{equipmentId}, my-kit-toggle, forge-count, clear-filters, alt-toggle-{i}, alt-video-{i}-{ai}. Workouts: 30 total. Focus filter counts: ALL=30, FATBURN=5, PERFORMANCE=5, STRENGTH=5, METCON=8, MOBILITY=4, RECOVERY=3. Time filter ≤15 MIN includes 14 workouts (atg-basics is 15 min and matches inclusive filter). Equipment chips total 17. Note: MATCHES MY KIT toggle state itself is NOT persisted (only the equipment array is). Cindy detail's first exercise (Pull-up) is the cleanest test case for alt-toggle MISSING KIT yellow badge when no kit is selected.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found this iteration. Phase B FORGE polish ships clean.
